name: HOME DEPOT, INC.
summary: Home Depot, Inc. is a home improvement retailer offering a broad range of products and services including building materials, home improvement products, lawn and garden items, and installation and professional services. The company serves both Do-It-Yourself (DIY) and Do-It-For-Me (DIFM) customers, as well as professional contractors (Pro customers), through its retail stores and interconnected digital platforms including Buy Online options for pickup, delivery, and ship-to-store.

products.name: Building Materials
products.description: Physical building and construction materials sold in retail stores and online.

products.name: Home Improvement Products
products.description: Wide range of products for home renovation and improvement projects.

products.name: Lawn and Garden Products
products.description: Outdoor and gardening products for DIY and professional customers.

products.name: Installation Services
products.description: Professional installation and home improvement services for DIFM customers.

products.name: BOPIS (Buy Online, Pickup In Store)
products.description: Interconnected retail platform allowing online purchase with in-store pickup.

products.name: BODFS (Buy Online, Deliver From Store)
products.description: Online purchase fulfilled via delivery directly from retail store locations.

products.name: Trade Credit
products.description: Credit offerings provided to professional and trade customers.

products.name: Private Label Credit Card (PLCC)
products.description: Branded credit card offering for Home Depot customers.
